sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the bar is now at the left side of the main room, near the white cross. The white cross is visible above the bar. Let me check the current bar position.
The bar appears to be at rows 28-32, cols 21-25. The white cross is at rows 31-32, cols 21-22. The bar should be overlapping the white cross, but the white cross is still visible. This is strange.
Let me check the current bar position.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current bar position
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"Orange: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 15:
        print(f"Blue bar: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"White cross: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check progress bar
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"Yellow: pixels={n['pixels']}")
    if n['color'] == 'R':
        print(f"Red: pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
